name: Water Source Heat Pump - Model WSHP-5T
description: Water source heat pump for zone conditioning
pdf_content:
WATER SOURCE HEAT PUMP SUBMITTAL
Project: Residential Tower Mechanical Systems

EQUIPMENT IDENTIFICATION
Manufacturer: ThermalComfort Inc.
Model Number: WSHP-5T-VR
Type: Vertical Water Source Heat Pump
Nominal Capacity: 5 tons (60,000 BTH)

COOLING PERFORMANCE (ISO 13256-1)
Total Cooling: 61,200 BTH @ 86°F EWT
Sensible Cooling: 45,900 BTH
EER: 13.5
Water Flow Rate: 15 GPM
Water Pressure Drop: 8.2 ft
Airflow: 2,000 CFM

HEATING PERFORMANCE
Heating Capacity: 72,000 BTH @ 70°F EWT
COP: 4.2
Water Flow Rate: 15 GPM
Water Pressure Drop: 8.5 ft
Airflow: 2,000 CFM

COMPRESSOR
Type: Scroll, R-410A refrigerant
Quantity: Single
Capacity Control: 2-stage
Crankcase Heater: 40W

FAN/MOTOR
Type: Direct drive centrifugal
Motor: ECM variable speed
Horsepower: 1 HP
External Static: 0.75" w.g. available

HEAT EXCHANGER
Type: Coaxial, cupro-nickel
Design Pressure: 450 PSI
Water Connections: 1-1/4" FPT
Refrigerant Charge: 8.5 lbs R-410A

AIR SIDE
Filter: 2" MERV 8 pleated
Auxiliary Heat: 10 kW electric (emergency)
Supply Air: Horizontal or downflow

ELECTRICAL
Voltage: 208-230V/1PH/60Hz
MCA: 35A
MOCP: 50A
Control Voltage: 24VAC

CONTROLS
Thermostat: Programmable, 2H/2C
Aquastat: High/low water temperature
Flow Switch: Paddle type
Safety Controls: High/low pressure, freeze stat
Diagnostics: LED fault indicators

COMMISSIONING CHECKLIST
□ Verify unit model and capacity
□ Check water flow rate and temperature
□ Measure water pressure drop across unit
□ Verify refrigerant charge (superheat/subcooling)
□ Test compressor operation in both stages
□ Check airflow and external static pressure
□ Verify heating and cooling capacities
□ Test changeover from cooling to heating mode
□ Calibrate thermostat and verify setpoints
□ Test auxiliary heat operation
□ Verify safety control operation
□ Check unit sound and vibration levels
□ Document performance test results

Compliance: AHRI 320/325/330
Submittal Date: March 1, 2024
Submitted By: Mechanical Systems Inc.
